attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SM.DEAL_APPROVAL_KEY,
  APPR.DEAL_ID as BK_DEAL_ID,
  cast(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as TIMESTAMP(0) ) APPROVAL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATETIME,
  COALESCE(QUEUE_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_QUEUE_STATUS_CD ,
  DATE AS DV_APPROVAL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT,
  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00 ' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS APPROVAL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DTM,
  DATE'3500-01-01'  AS DV_APPROVAL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DT,
  COALESCE( NDECI.BK_DEAL_DECISION_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_DECISION_NAME,
  COALESCE(NAPPR. BK_APPROVER_ROLE_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_APPROVER_ROLE_NAME,
  COALESCE(QUEUE_SEQ,'0') AS QUEUE_SEQUENCE_INT,
  COALESCE(SUBMITTED_BY,'UNKNOWN') SRC_RPTD_SUBMITTER_ID,
  COALESCE(NAPPRCIS.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DV_APPRVR_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
  COALESCE(APPROVER_ID,'UNKNOWN') SRC_RPTD_APPROVER_ID,
  COALESCE(NCISCO.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DV_SUBMITTER_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
  COALESCE(SOURCE,'UNK') AS APPROVAL_SOURCE_CD,
  COALESCE(DECISION_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS DECISION_ON_DTM,
  COALESCE(CAST (DECISION_DATE AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_DECISION_ON_DT,
  COALESCE(APPROVAL_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS APPROVAL_CATEGORY_CD,
  COALESCE(USER_ROLE,'UNKNOWN') AS USER_ROLE_CD,
  COALESCE(APPROVER_COMMENTS,'UNKNOWN') AS APPROVER_COMMENTS_TXT,
  OBJECT_ID AS SK_OBJECT_ID_INT,
  APPR.APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD ,
  COALESCE(NGROUP.BK_APPROVER_GROUP_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_APPROVER_GROUP_TYPE_NAME,
  COALESCE(SUBMITTED_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS  SUBMITTED_ON_DTM,
  COALESCE(CAST(SUBMITTED_DATE AS DATE), CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_SUBMITTED_ON_DT,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)EDW_CREATE_DTM,
    USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
    USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
    ACTION_CODE,
    'I' AS DML_TYEPE
  FROM 
  (
  SELECT
  ST.OBJECT_ID,
  ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
  ST.DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID,
  DECISION,
  APPROVER_ROLE,
  QUEUE_SEQ,
  APPROVER_ID,
  DECISION_DATE ,
  APPROVAL_TYPE ,  
  USER_ROLE,
  APPROVER_COMMENTS,
  SUBMITTED_DATE,
  'QUAL' AS APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD,
  QUEUE_STATUS,
  SUBMITTED_BY,
  SOURCE,
  APPR_GROUP_TYPE,
  ACTION_CODE
  FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CQ_APPR_ROUTE ST
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT
  EX.OBJECT_ID,
  EX.DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
  EX.DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID,
  DECISION,
  APPROVER_ROLE,
  QUEUE_SEQ,
  APPROVER_ID,
  DECISION_DATE ,
  APPROVAL_TYPE ,  
  USER_ROLE,
  APPROVER_COMMENTS,
  SUBMITTED_DATE,
  APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD,
  QUEUE_STATUS,
  SUBMITTED_BY,
  SOURCE,
  APPR_GROUP_TYPE,
  ACTION_CODE
  FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CQ_PDR_APPR_ROUTE EX
  ) APPR
  INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DEAL_APPROVAL_DETAIL SM
  ON SM.SK_OBJECT_ID_INT=APPR.OBJECT_ID
  AND SM.APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD=APPR.APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL
  ON DEAL.BK_DEAL_ID = APPR.DEAL_ID  ---- Modified after CCWR JunFY25 Release
  /* DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT=APPR.DEAL_OBJECT_ID  */   
  LEFT  JOIN ( SELECT BK_DEAL_DECISION_NAME,EL.LOV_INDEX FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL ,$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_DECISION  DECI
  WHERE  EL.LOV_VALUE=DECI.BK_DEAL_DECISION_NAME
  AND EL.LOV_TYPE='DSA_DECISION')  NDECI
   ON APPR.DECISION=NDECI.LOV_INDEX                                            
  LEFT  JOIN ( SELECT BK_APPROVER_ROLE_NAME,EL.LOV_INDEX FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL ,$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_APPROVER_ROLE  DECI
  WHERE  EL.LOV_VALUE=DECI.BK_APPROVER_ROLE_NAME
  AND  EL.LOV_TYPE ='DEAL_CONTACT'
       AND EL.LOV_SUBTYPE = 'APPROVER_ROLE') NAPPR
  ON APPR.APPROVER_ROLE=NAPPR.LOV_INDEX
   LEFT  JOIN ( SELECT BK_APPROVER_GROUP_TYPE_NAME,EL.LOV_INDEX FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL , $$SLSORDVWDB.N_APPROVER_GROUP_TYPE  DECI
  WHERE  EL.LOV_VALUE=DECI.BK_APPROVER_GROUP_TYPE_NAME
  AND EL.LOV_TYPE='APPR_GROUP_TYPE') NGROUP
   ON APPR.APPR_GROUP_TYPE=NGROUP.LOV_INDEX
  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCISCO
  ON NCISCO.CEC_ID=APPR.SUBMITTED_BY              
  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NAPPRCIS
  ON NAPPRCIS.CEC_ID=APPR.APPROVER_ID

SELECT 
  BATCH_ID,
  DEAL_ID,
  OBJECT_ID,
  DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
  APPROVER_ROLE,
  QUEUE_SEQ,
  APPROVER_ID,
  DECISION,
  APPROVER_COMMENTS,
  SUBMITTED_DATE,
  APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD,
  DECISION_DATE ,
  CREATED_ON,
  CREATED_BY,
  UPDATED_ON,
  UPDATED_BY,
  SUBMITTED_BY,
  APPR_GROUP_TYPE,
  USER_ROLE,
  QUEUE_STATUS,
  APPROVAL_TYPE ,  
  SOURCE,
  CREATE_DATETIME,
  ACTION_CODE,
  'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
  SS_CODE
  FROM 
  (
  SELECT
  BATCH_ID,
  ST.OBJECT_ID,
  ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
  ST.DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID,
  DECISION,
  APPROVER_ROLE,
  QUEUE_SEQ,
  APPROVER_ID,
  DECISION_DATE ,
  APPROVAL_TYPE ,  
  USER_ROLE,
  APPROVER_COMMENTS,
  SUBMITTED_DATE,
  'QUAL' AS APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD,
  QUEUE_STATUS,
  SUBMITTED_BY,
  SOURCE,
  APPR_GROUP_TYPE,
  CREATED_ON,
  CREATED_BY,
  UPDATED_ON,
  UPDATED_BY,
  CREATE_DATETIME,
  ACTION_CODE,
  SS_CODE
  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CQ_APPR_ROUTE ST
   ) APPR
  WHERE APPR.SS_CODE IN ('CCW', 'CCWR')
  AND
  (
    NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL 
      WHERE DEAL.BK_DEAL_ID = APPR.DEAL_ID
    ) 
    OR APPR.DEAL_ID IS NULL
  )

SELECT 
 RANK () OVER ( ORDER BY ROUTE.OBJECT_ID,APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD ) + MAX_VAL DEAL_APPROVAL_KEY,
 ROUTE.OBJECT_ID AS SK_OBJECT_ID_INT,
 APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 FROM 
 ( 
  SEL OBJECT_ID ,'QUAL' AS APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD FROM $$STGDB.ST_CQ_APPR_ROUTE
 ) ROUTE,
 (SELECT COALESCE(MAX (DEAL_APPROVAL_KEY) , 0) MAX_VAL
 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DEAL_APPROVAL_DETAIL) SM
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
 SELECT 1 
 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DEAL_APPROVAL_DETAIL SM
 WHERE SM.SK_OBJECT_ID_INT= ROUTE.OBJECT_ID
 AND  SM.APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD=ROUTE.APPROVAL_DEAL_TYPE_CD
 )
